message:
refactor(extensions): replace hand-rolled semver parser with semver crate

Replace the custom SemverTriplet struct and parse_semver_triplet/
matches_semver_token functions with the well-tested `semver` crate
(v1.0.27). The new implementation:

- Uses normalize_semver_literal() to handle v-prefix stripping and
  two-part version shorthand (e.g. "1.2" → "1.2.0") while preserving
  pre-release and build metadata suffixes
- Uses normalize_version_requirement() to parse version range tokens
  and validate them through semver::VersionReq
- Delegates all range matching (^, ~, >=, exact, wildcard) to the
  semver crate's standards-compliant implementation

Also marks session_picker.rs conflict as resolved (stash pop artifact
from earlier rebase — no actual conflict markers present).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -98,6 +98,7 @@ md-5 = "0.10"
 hmac = "0.12"
 getrandom = "0.4.1"
 regex = "1.12.3"
+semver = "1.0.27"
 crc32c = "0.6"
 ast-grep-core = "0.40"
 ast-grep-language = { version = "0.40", default-features = false, features = [
